---
bibliography: ../references.bib
link-citations: true
number-sections: false
---

# References {.unnumbered}

This appendix lists every source **cited** in handbook chapters (`[@key]` citations). Entries are drawn from [`references.bib`](../references.bib).

For a **topic-organized reading guide** (textbooks, CONSORT/STROBE/TRIPOD, respiratory methods), see [REFERENCES.md](REFERENCES.md).

::: {#refs}
:::

## How to cite this handbook

Until formal publication, cite the repository version and access date:

> *Statistical Methods for Respiratory Research: Foundations through High-Dimensional, Longitudinal, and Causal Analysis.* Open handbook draft. Repository: `respiratory-research-methods` (accessed YYYY-MM-DD).

Register a DOI (e.g. Zenodo) when publishing an open edition.
